machines.title: Constellation
machines.blurb: Plant points of light. Watch them drift, find each other, and wire themselves together.

machines.title: Orbit
machines.blurb: Slingshot little worlds around a star and watch them fall into orbit. Pure gravity, no rules.

machines.title: Ripples
machines.blurb: Tap the dark and it answers — rings spread out and ring a note. Higher up sings higher.

machines.title: Skein
machines.blurb: A tangle of threads and knots. Drag the knots until nothing crosses — every board can be made calm.

machines.title: Embers
machines.blurb: Drop in any photo. It finds the outline, you tweak it, then a storm of embers swarms in to draw it in fire.
